name: pldi-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for PLDI submissions: venue fit, HotCRP double-blind submission, author response, PACMPL camera-ready, Zenodo artifact evaluation with ACM badges, benchmark reproducibility, supplementary material, review process, writing style, related work, experiments, and workflow. Grounded in the PLDI 2026 CFP, pldi26.sigplan.org, PACMPL/ACM DL, and SIGPLAN policy pages checked on 2026-07-08.
